title: Deduplicate header and add subtitle in Header component

requirements.summary: Remove duplicate Header rendering so only one sticky header is shown (no duplication on Home page).
acceptanceCriteria: When viewing the non-admin user experience, only one header bar is visible at the top (no duplicate 'Campus Cafeteria' headers).
No other parts of the page layout are changed beyond removing the duplicate header instance.

file_operations.description: Conditionally render the shared <Header /> only for admin mode (or otherwise remove the extra instance) so the user (HomePage) flow has exactly one top sticky header and HomePage no longer ends up with a duplicated header.
Keep the existing HomePage-owned <Header /> (with its proceed-to-payment wiring) as the single header for the non-admin experience, relying on the App-level change to prevent duplication.

requirements.summary: Add a smaller light-gray subtitle line 'JSPM Canteen' directly under 'Campus Cafeteria' in the header title block with clean spacing.
acceptanceCriteria: The header shows 'Campus Cafeteria' as the main title and 'JSPM Canteen' immediately beneath it.
The subtitle is smaller than the title and uses a light gray color.
Spacing between the title and subtitle is clean and visually consistent (no crowding or excessive gap).

file_operations.description: Update the title block to render the exact subtitle text 'JSPM Canteen' directly below 'Campus Cafeteria', styled smaller than the title with a light gray color and tidy vertical spacing; do not modify other header layout or behavior.

requirements.summary: Preserve right-aligned Login/Logout button in the single header and ensure cart/login interactions (including proceed-to-payment from cart drawer) still work after de-duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: The Login/Logout button remains right-aligned in the header (same row as before).
Proceed-to-payment from the cart drawer still navigates the user to the payment flow as it did before the header de-duplication.
No additional layout changes are introduced outside of the header de-duplication and subtitle update.

file_operations.description: Ensure header action area layout remains right-aligned (keep existing flex/justify behavior) and verify the CartDrawer proceed-to-payment callback wiring remains intact after any title/subtitle adjustments.

After de-duplicating header rendering, confirm that the remaining header instance in the user flow is the one that receives HomePage's proceed-to-payment callback so cart->payment navigation continues working unchanged.
